name: Can I get paid for missed work due to hearing loss doctor visits?
description: Yes, TTD for treatment time off + medical.[5]

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid for missed work due to hearing loss doctor visits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, TTD for treatment time off + medical.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, temporary disability benefits if unable to work during treatment, plus medical costs.[5] Permanent partial later for impairment.[2] Key factors: Prove lost time causal to injury, doctor notes support.[5] File for TTD promptly, track all visits.[3] Attorney maximizes all benefits.[5]
